programmes.show_description: Former Kiss FM DJ Robin Banks presents the 20 biggest party tunes of 1998 - with Mousse T, Faithless, Dario G & the debut of the Vengaboys!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from Britpop, Boybands & R&B to the birth of electronic dance beats!
60 minutes of back to back number 1s from 2000 - from Westlife to Destiny's Child via Craig David & Eminem! With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
Every track a smash hit, every video a UK chart number one in the 00s. What more could you possibly need in life!
30 classic boyband tracks back to back - one from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of party anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
The 40 biggest songs of the decade. Including 29 UK number 1s & big million-selling hits from Clean Bandit, Pharrell & Ed Sheeran.
Dust off your flip phones and get ready to dance the day away with the ultimate collection of hits that'll transport you back to those unforgettable millenium parties!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
There's nothing quite like a cheesy good party... Unless its a 90s cheesy party that is!! These are the greatest party anthems from the 90s. Fact!

programmes.show_name: As Seen On TV with Robin Banks
programmes.show_description: Robin Banks' chart with big TV connections - could be theme tunes, Comic Relief, adverts or just a song made famous by a TV show. Our top 25 chart is Absolutely Fabulous!
Turn it up loud! As we return to the biggest bangers & classic floorfillers that make every 90s & 00s party epic!
Songs from the 00s that you really like, but are a bit too embarrassed to admit? If that's the case then Pat Sharp urges you to have a little less shame in your musical game!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
Dim the lights, set the mood and get ready for the passion, heartbreak & timeless romance of the 2000s. Anthems for a generation that continue to resonate today.
Songs you may have forgotten from artists you'll certainly know!
They left us with one massive radio hit, but can your remember their names? Pat Sharp hails 30 of the best songs from artists that never quite reached those dizzy heights again!
The standout chart music that defined the decade - from indie rock, singer-songwriters & girl bands to dance, R&B and the early emergence of UK garage & grime.
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Turn on & tune in for an egg-cellent mashup of party anthems from the 90s & 00s! No egg-cuses in this ultimate holiday scramble, we've got this Easter party started!
Join us for a spectacular musical journey, a special video showcase highlighting the iconic Number One hits of one of Britain's most beloved pop bands, Take That!
Starting in 1990, two decades of the biggest songs from America's US A list!
Broom Cupboard legend & Heart Radio club maestro Toby Antis presents his 40 school disco favourites from the 00s!
The biggest party songs & sing-out-loud anthems from the 90s & 00s to provide the perfect soundtrack to your weekend!
From divas of the dance floor to queens of the night! These 20 ladies have the sass, style & songs to take over & run this party!
The biggest party songs & sing-out-loud anthems from the 90s & 00s to provide the perfect soundtrack to your weekend!
H, Claire, Lee, Lisa & Faye bring you 25 sexy videos from a classic decade of pop! With Britney, Janet, Kylie & Aqua, plus a couple of anthems from Steps themselves.
Anthems & cheesy tunes from the bars, clubs & pool parties of Mediterranean holidays gone by! Expect Whigfield, Ace Of Base & many more that you enjoyed in the sun!
